summary: Experienced Cloud Data Engineer with over 5 years of expertise in designing and optimizing scalable Azure-based cloud data platforms and large-scale data pipelines. Proficient in Python, SQL, Azure Data Factory, and Databricks, adept at leveraging DevOps for CI/CD. Spearheaded the development of a BERT-based NLP pipeline that automated product comparison, successfully reducing manual competitive analysis by 65% and enabling faster data-driven decisions.

education.degree: Master of Science, Analytics and Data Science

responsibilities: Architect large-scale data pipelines within complex data environments, utilizing Azure Data Factory and Databricks to process high-volume datasets, supporting Python-based Azure Functions APIs and ensuring efficient data flow.
Innovated and deployed a BERT-based NLP pipeline through CI/CD workflows using Azure DevOps and Git, reducing manual competitive product analysis by 65% and enhancing data-driven decision-making.
Refine complex SQL queries across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Azure SQL databases, applying indexing, partitioning, and query tuning techniques to accelerate performance for large analytical datasets.
Orchestrate end-to-end ETL workflows, transforming raw web data into structured Delta Lake datasets, enabling downstream machine learning models and comprehensive business analytics.
Evaluate data platform effectiveness and deliver Power BI dashboards with actionable insights, facilitating data-driven recommendations for pricing optimization strategies to stakeholders.

Spearhead full lifecycle development and rigorous end-to-end testing of Azure data solutions, effectively troubleshooting pipeline failures and debugging distributed data workflows to maintain reliability.

Engineered scalable ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory and Python, integrating diverse on-premise and third-party data sources across complex enterprise data environments, enhancing data accessibility.
Constructed predictive inventory optimization and waste reduction models leveraging supervised learning algorithms, which improved stock accuracy by 18% and reduced operational waste by 25%.
Implemented robust CI/CD and MLOps pipelines using Azure DevOps, automating data ingestion, preprocessing, model deployment, and continuous monitoring to streamline machine learning lifecycles.
Modeled complex SQL queries across Azure SQL and various relational databases, supporting large-scale enterprise reporting systems with enhanced data retrieval efficiency.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate intricate business requirements into scalable Azure-based cloud data platform solutions, ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
Contributed to critical cloud data platform migration initiatives, modernizing legacy infrastructure into scalable Azure-based distributed data pipelines using Data Lake and Synapse Analytics.
Configured efficient distributed data ingestion pipelines, orchestrated through Apache Airflow, to process large datasets into Azure Data Lake and Synapse Analytics, improving data availability.
Integrated Azure Event Hub with Python-based Azure Functions, enabling real-time event streaming and scalable serverless data processing for critical applications.
Streamlined comprehensive monitoring and debugging strategies for distributed systems, ensuring high reliability and scalability across diverse Azure cloud services.
Developed robust SQL-based ETL pipelines, integrating multi-channel marketing datasets into centralized reporting systems, improving data consolidation.
Enhanced marketing data quality through advanced SQL tuning, rigorous validation processes, and robust governance frameworks, which increased data-driven campaign effectiveness by 40%.
Created interactive Tableau and Power BI dashboards, analyzing month-over-month marketing performance and identifying spend optimization opportunities for stakeholders.

projects.title: Amazon Product Suggestion System
description: Built a real-time product recommendation API using Python and FastAPI, processing product data collected via automated web scraping pipelines to deliver instant suggestions.
Established a BERT-based Named Entity Recognition model via Hugging Face, accurately extracting product attributes and generating suggestions with 88% accuracy.
Deployed scalable machine learning inference pipelines, demonstrating end-to-end data ingestion, model inference, and API delivery for robust system performance.

projects.title: Newspaper Delivery System
description: Designed an automated newspaper content delivery pipeline using Python and Playwright for efficient web data extraction.
Defined optimized PostgreSQL database schemas, effectively storing article metadata and subscriber preferences for personalized content delivery.
Automated personalized email delivery of curated news content utilizing SMTP and IMAP protocols, enhancing subscriber engagement.

projects.title: Trip Planner Agent
description: Formulated an intelligent travel planning agent, aggregating route, fuel price, and location data using Google APIs and web scraping for comprehensive trip planning.
Implemented object-oriented data processing modules, effectively cleaning, standardizing, and integrating diverse travel datasets for accuracy.
Generated optimized travel recommendations based on aggregated route and fuel price analysis, aiming to reduce travel costs by up to 15%.

certification: Business Intelligence and Data Mining - University of Texas at Dallas
Applied Machine Learning - University of Texas at Dallas
